versions.version_description: It list all the chords for the whole song.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Shontelle - Impossible
CAPO on 1 (all chords relative to capo)


[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
I remember years ago[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch] 
Someone told me I should take[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Caution when it comes to love[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
I did, I did[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
And you were strong and I was not[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch] 
My illusion, my mistake[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
I was careless, I forgot[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
I did[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]Am7[/ch]
And now when all is done[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Bm7[/ch]
There is nothing to say[/tab]
[tab]                                [ch]C[/ch]
You have gone and so effortlessly[/tab]

You have won
[tab]                  [ch]Dsus4[/ch]
You can go ahead tell them[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]                 [ch]Em[/ch]
Tell them all I know now[/tab]
[tab]                   [ch]G[/ch]
Shout it from the rooftops[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]D[/ch]
Write it on the skyline[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]
All we had is gone now[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Em[/ch]
Tell them I was happy[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]G[/ch]
And my heart is broken[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]D[/ch]
All my scars are open[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]C[/ch]
Tell them what I hoped would be[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Em[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
Impossible, impossible[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
Impossible, impossible[/tab]


[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Falling out of love is hard[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]
I know, I know[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Thinking all you need is there[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
Building faith on love is worst[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]
Empty promises will wear[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
I know (I know)[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]     [ch]Am7[/ch]

[tab]                     [ch]Bm7[/ch]
There is nothing to say[/tab]
